message:
ci: add TSC benchmark using Microsoft's methodology

- Uses TypeScript compiler source as test input (same as microsoft/typescript-go)
- Compares: EdgeBox-compiled tsc vs Node.js tsc vs tsgo (Go)
- Downloads TypeScript source from github.com/microsoft/TypeScript
- Uses tinybench for proper statistical benchmarking

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,157 @@
+name: TSC Benchmark
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+    paths:
+      - 'src/**'
+      - 'benchmark/**'
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+    paths:
+      - 'src/**'
+      - 'benchmark/**'
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+concurrency:
+  group: tsc-benchmark-${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
+jobs:
+  tsc-benchmark:
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    timeout-minutes: 30
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest]
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          submodules: recursive
+
+      - name: Setup Zig
+        uses: goto-bus-stop/setup-zig@v2
+        with:
+          version: 0.15.2
+
+      - name: Setup Bun
+        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
+        with:
+          bun-version: latest
+
+      - name: Setup Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: '22'
+
+      - name: Setup Go
+        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
+        with:
+          go-version: '1.24'
+
+      - name: Install benchmark dependencies
+        run: |
+          cd benchmark
+          bun install
+
+      - name: Build EdgeBox compiler
+        run: zig build cli
+
+      - name: Build tsgo (Microsoft Go TypeScript)
+        run: |
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go.git /tmp/typescript-go || true
+          cd /tmp/typescript-go
+          go build -o built/local/tsgo ./cmd/tsgo 2>/dev/null || echo "tsgo build skipped"
+
+      - name: Run TSC benchmark
+        run: |
+          echo "=== TSC Benchmark (${{ matrix.os }}) ==="
+          echo "Based on Microsoft's typescript-go methodology"
+          echo "Using TypeScript compiler source as test input"
+          echo ""
+          cd benchmark
+          bun run run.ts
+
+      - name: Upload results
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: tsc-benchmark-${{ matrix.os }}
+          path: benchmark/results.json
+          if-no-files-found: ignore
+
+  summary:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: tsc-benchmark
+    if: always()
+    steps:
+      - name: Download All Results
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          pattern: tsc-benchmark-*
+          merge-multiple: true
+          path: results
+
+      - name: Generate Summary
+        run: |
+          echo "# TSC Benchmark" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "Based on Microsoft's typescript-go benchmark methodology." >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "Uses TypeScript compiler source (~100k lines) as test input." >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "## Tools Compared" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "- **EdgeBox tsc**: TypeScript compiler AOT-compiled with EdgeBox" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "- **Node.js tsc**: TypeScript compiler on Node.js (baseline)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "- **tsgo**: Microsoft's native Go TypeScript compiler" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+
+          if [ -f results/results.json ]; then
+            echo "## Results" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo '```json' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            cat results/results.json >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          else
+            echo "_Results not available_" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          fi
+
+      - name: Post PR Comment
+        if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
+        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        with:
+          script: |
+            const fs = require('fs');
+            let body = '## TSC Benchmark\n\n';
+            body += 'Based on Microsoft\'s typescript-go benchmark methodology.\n';
+            body += 'Uses TypeScript compiler source as test input.\n\n';
+
+            try {
+              const results = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('results/results.json', 'utf8'));
+
+              body += '| Tool | Mean (ms) | Std Dev |\n';
+              body += '|------|-----------|--------|\n';
+
+              for (const r of results) {
+                body += `| ${r.tool} | ${r.mean.toFixed(0)} | ±${r.stdDev.toFixed(0)} |\n`;
+              }
+
+              const nodeResult = results.find(r => r.tool === 'Node.js tsc');
+              if (nodeResult) {
+                body += '\n### Speedup vs Node.js\n\n';
+                for (const r of results) {
+                  if (r.tool !== 'Node.js tsc' && r.mean > 0) {
+                    const speedup = (nodeResult.mean / r.mean).toFixed(2);
+                    body += `- **${r.tool}**: ${speedup}x faster\n`;
+                  }
+                }
+              }
+            } catch (e) {
+              body += '_Results not available_\n';
+            }
+
+            github.rest.issues.createComment({
+              issue_number: context.issue.number,
+              owner: context.repo.owner,
+              repo: context.repo.repo,
+              body: body
+            });
